questions.question:
A StatefulSet diagnostics brief is incomplete and contains stale or unsafe workload identity guidance.

A ConfigMap named `stateful-identity-brief` already exists in namespace `stateful-lab`. Repair it so that:
- `targetStatefulSet` is `web`
- `headlessService` is `web-svc`
- `statefulSetInventory` is `kubectl get statefulset web -n stateful-lab -o wide`
- `serviceInspection` is `kubectl get svc web-svc -n stateful-lab -o yaml`
- `podInventory` is `kubectl get pods -n stateful-lab -l app=web -o wide`
- `ordinalDnsCheck` is `kubectl exec -n stateful-lab dns-debug -- nslookup web-0.web-svc.stateful-lab.svc.cluster.local`
- `pvcInventory` is `kubectl get pvc -n stateful-lab`
- `safeManifestNote` is `confirm serviceName: web-svc and stable pod ordinals before changing manifests`
- save the repaired ConfigMap manifest to `/tmp/exam/q901/stateful-identity-brief.yaml`
- save a plain-text checklist to `/tmp/exam/q901/stateful-identity-checklist.txt` with the sections `StatefulSet Inventory`, `Stable Network Identity`, and `Safe Manifest Review`

Do not delete the StatefulSet, do not delete PVCs, and do not convert the headless Service into a NodePort or LoadBalancer during this drill.

verification.description: The StatefulSet diagnostics brief ConfigMap uses the intended StatefulSet target, headless Service inspection, pod inventory, and safe manifest guidance
The exported checklist contains the required sections and exact StatefulSet inventory, ordinal DNS, and PVC inspection commands
The repaired ConfigMap manifest is exported and stale unsafe StatefulSet remediation guidance is removed
